channel.title: Kuldeep Chandra Vishwakarma | RSS Feed
channel.description: Latest logs, tech news, and system telemetry from Kuldeep's personal operating system.

item.title: Building an Automated AI News Feed using Next.js & Gemini
item.description: A deep-dive guide on how to parse RSS feeds, run them through Google Gemini for relevance, and automatically publish posts.

item.title: How to Achieve a 100 Lighthouse Performance Rating in Next.js
item.description: Learn the exact performance optimization techniques I used to get a perfect Lighthouse score on my portfolio and StartupWire.
